name: Elena Garcia
summary: Highly motivated and results-oriented Engineering Manager with 8+ years of experience leading cross-functional teams in the development of scalable software solutions. Proven ability to drive technical strategy, foster collaboration, and deliver high-quality products on time and within budget. Seeking to leverage leadership skills to contribute to innovative projects.

experience.title: Lead Software Engineer
experience.description: Led a team of 10 engineers in the design, development, and deployment of a new microservices-based platform, improving system performance by 30%. Mentored junior engineers, conducted code reviews, and implemented agile methodologies to enhance team productivity. Collaborated with product managers to define technical roadmaps and ensure alignment with business objectives.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
experience.description: Developed and maintained critical backend services using Python and Django, handling over 1 million daily requests. Contributed to the architectural design of new features and participated in on-call rotations to ensure system reliability. Optimized database queries, reducing average response time by 20%.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Worked on the full software development lifecycle for web applications, focusing on front-end development with React and back-end services in Node.js. Implemented unit and integration tests to ensure code quality. Participated in daily stand-ups and sprint planning meetings.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Engineering
Bachelor of Science in Software Engineering
